# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| latest  | ✅        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please use [GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting](https://github.com/h1d3mun3/wevo-space/security/advisories/new) to report security vulnerabilities.

Do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

We will respond as soon as possible and work with you to address the issue before public disclosure.
